ETH_UCY.caveat: Endpoint neural prediction is projected to linear waypoints and scored against reconstructed real waypoint labels. This tests endpoint dynamics as a full-trajectory bridge; it is not learned waypoint-shape dynamics, not Stage5C, not SMC, not metric, and not seconds-level.

TrajNet.caveat: Endpoint neural prediction is projected to linear waypoints and scored against reconstructed real waypoint labels. This tests endpoint dynamics as a full-trajectory bridge; it is not learned waypoint-shape dynamics, not Stage5C, not SMC, not metric, and not seconds-level.
